archetype_reasoning: A sleek, dark high-contrast theme best suits a professional creator tool. It minimizes glare for extended editing sessions and feels like a modern film/audio production studio. Bright accents (Warning Yellow) command attention for critical recording or generating actions.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-white
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-white
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold text-zinc-400

card.style: bg-[#18181b] border border-[#27272a] rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm
card.interaction: Focuses on sharp inner contrast. Uses 1px border for definition.

button.primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-yellow-400 hover:text-black transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-300 focus:outline-none
button.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-700 hover:text-white transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-600 focus:outline-none
button.ghost: text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

input.style: bg-[#09090b] border border-[#27272a] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:border-yellow-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500 transition-colors

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#09090b]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#27272a]

icons.reasoning: Phosphor Icons provide a clean, technical, and slightly chunky look that perfectly complements the high-contrast, Swiss dark mode aesthetic.

layout_strategy.dashboard: Mode B: Control Room Grid. 12-column grid system with dense spacing for the editor interface. Use h-full to ensure child elements stretch across columns.
layout_strategy.script_editor: Multi-pane split layout. Left sidebar for video URLs/transcripts, central main area for Hook/Body/CTA editor, and right sidebar for Claude Chat and Voiceover/Brand settings.

backgrounds.description: Dark, moody abstract background with subtle light streaks. Can be used as a low-opacity background behind the main editor area or login screen.
A glowing purple ring of light on black background. Useful for voiceover generation loading states or audio waveform visualization.

avatars.description: User avatar for the dashboard profile.
Avatar for the 'Hoda' or client approval workflow.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex bento/multi-pane layouts. Do not use generic Shadcn Card layouts if they restrict height/width stretching.
For the ElevenLabs integration (Demo mode), use a visual audio waveform when 'generating' voiceover.
Implement the script editor as a structured block editor: Hook (with 5 options toggleable), Body, and CTA as distinct sections.
Claude Chat should be integrated as a right-hand drawer or sidebar, allowing users to converse while keeping the script editor in view.
Use Phosphor Icons for all UI icons (install with `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`).
Font installation: Import Google Fonts - 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans'. Outfit for all headings, IBM Plex Sans for body/labels.
Data-testid attributes MUST be added to all interactive elements for testing.
The UI should feel technical and advanced. Rely heavily on 1px borders (border-[#27272a]) to separate panels rather than shadows.
Provide a brand approval workflow section where a thumbnail, ad code, or partnership tag can be added and sent to a client.
